description: Report synthesizer generates a full markdown report with all standard sections and Mermaid diagrams
prompt: Generate a comprehensive research report from our AI code review market research findings. Include all standard sections. Use the report-synthesizer agent.

expectations.description: Report includes an Executive Summary section
Report includes a Recommendations section
Report includes Mermaid visualizations
Deprecated v0.3 patterns are not used
Produces a full report with Executive Summary, Market Overview, Competitive Landscape, Trend Analysis, SWOT, Recommendations, Risk Assessment, and Appendix sections

description: Report synthesizer reads dimension findings from the blackboard in addition to state.json
prompt: Generate a report from the research session. The blackboard task_id is 'ai-code-review' and contains findings from competitive, sizing, and trends analysts. Use the report-synthesizer agent.

expectations.description: Blackboard is read for findings data
Dimension findings keys are referenced
Incorporates blackboard dimension findings alongside state.json data for complete coverage in the report

description: Report synthesizer recalls prior context and captures report completion to Atlatl
prompt: Generate a report for the cloud infrastructure market research. Check Atlatl for any prior research on this topic first. Use the report-synthesizer agent.

expectations.description: Atlatl memory recall or capture is referenced
Deprecated patterns are not used
Prior context is recalled from Atlatl to enrich the report, and report completion is captured back for future reference

description: Report synthesizer tailors output for an executive audience with strategic language and minimal jargon
prompt: Generate an executive-focused report from our fintech market research. The audience is C-suite executives who need to make a go/no-go decision on market entry. Use the report-synthesizer agent.

expectations.description: Executive audience is acknowledged in tailoring
Strategic or bottom-line focused language is used
Language is executive-appropriate: leads with bottom-line impact, minimizes technical jargon, focuses on strategic implications with clear recommendations

description: Report synthesizer tailors output for investors with market opportunity and growth metrics
prompt: Generate an investor-ready report from our autonomous vehicle research. The audience is Series B investors evaluating market opportunity. Use the report-synthesizer agent.

expectations.description: Investor audience is acknowledged
Market opportunity or TAM is prominently featured
Leads with market opportunity size, includes growth metrics and competitive moat, addresses risks, and frames findings for investment decision-making

description: Report synthesizer validates hypotheses stated in the elicitation context with explicit verdicts
prompt: Generate a report for our edge computing research. The elicitation included these hypotheses: 1) 'Edge computing will cannibalize cloud revenue within 5 years', 2) 'Telcos will be the dominant edge providers', 3) 'Latency-sensitive applications will drive 80% of adoption'. Validate each hypothesis against findings. Use the report-synthesizer agent.

expectations.description: Hypothesis validation is included in the report
Explicit validation verdicts are given
Each of the three stated hypotheses receives an explicit validation verdict (SUPPORTED, CHALLENGED, or INCONCLUSIVE) with supporting evidence from findings

description: Report synthesizer generates multiple distinct Mermaid diagram types for visualization
prompt: Generate a report with rich visualizations for our cybersecurity market research. Include competitive positioning maps, trend scenario diagrams, and market share breakdowns. Use the report-synthesizer agent.

expectations.description: Mermaid diagram types are referenced
Mermaid syntax is used for visualizations
At least 2 distinct Mermaid diagram types are generated (e.g., quadrantChart for positioning, stateDiagram for scenarios, pie for market share)
